name: Pasta Chicken Salad with Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
Poach the chicken breasts in lightly salted water or chicken broth until cooked through, about 10 minutes. (Alternatively, season the chicken with salt and pepper and bake it at 375°F for 25 minutes). Once cooled, remove the meat from the bones and slice thinly against the grain.
Cook linguine in salted water according to package instructions. Rinse with cold water to cool, then drain the linguine.
Combine chicken, linguine, peppers, scallions, and peanuts in a large bowl.
Prepare vinaigrette by whisking together lemon juice, Dijon mustard, brown sugar, minced garlic, chopped fresh ginger, red wine vinegar, sesame oil, vegetable oil, olive oil, salt, and pepper to taste. Gradually pour the dressing over the salad; mix well.
Garnish with cucumber slices (peel, halve, seed, and slice) and watercress sprigs.
